MMP (marginal message passing)
===============================

JAX routines in ``pymdp.algos`` implement **marginal message passing** over observation (and optional transition) structure for sequence-shaped inference. Dependencies are given explicitly via ``A_dependencies`` and ``B_dependencies`` for factorized models.

.. seealso::

   * :doc:`inference`
   * :doc:`fpi` — single-step / mean-field FPI variants
   * Repository tests: ``test/test_mmp.py``
   * Sidecar index: ``docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md``

API reference
-------------

.. currentmodule:: pymdp.algos

.. autofunction:: run_mmp

.. autofunction:: run_online_filtering
